---
title: "NYC Basemap"
author: "James McQuilkin"
date: "2026-02-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#Load Packages
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

## Plotting 2020 Neighborhood Tabulation Areas NYC

```{r}
nynta <- read_sf(here("project_data/nynta2020_25d/nynta2020.shp"))
plot(nynta["NTA2020"])
```

## 

```{}

```
